items.title: Asylum seekers sent to Nauru by Australia say they are going hungry

children.content: According to a survey of 78 asylum seekers on Nauru, 99 per cent said they were regularly skipping meals because they could not afford to buy enough food, while more than three quarters said they rarely had access to free, clean drinking water.
